name: API热点网精选推荐
omitted_reference_modules: static app shell scripts that are not needed for GEOFlow routing
hard-coded article list data; latest articles now come from GEOFlow published articles
non-GEOFlow deployment files such as robots.txt, sitemap.xml, and llms.txt

modules.header: Recommendation-page navigation from the local static page on the default homepage; base GEOFlow header remains for search/category/article states.
modules.footer: Recommendation-page footer from the local static page on the default homepage; base GEOFlow footer remains elsewhere.
modules.home.hero: Static recommendation hero adapted from the local recommend page.
modules.home.recommendation_cards: Three curated recommendation cards for AIGoCode, PackyAPI, and PipeLLM.
modules.home.latest_articles: Dynamic latest 10 published articles, rendered after the recommendation cards with GEOFlow article routes and summaries; homepage More actions point to the pc review-center category.
modules.home.rank_table: Static recommendation comparison table from the local page.
modules.home.workflow_blocks: Static gateway setup, scenario, certification, and API readiness blocks from the local page.
modules.home.article_card: Latest-article cards using existing article paginator data.
modules.category.article_card: API recommendation style category header, chip tabs, and rounded latest-article cards.
modules.article.hero: API recommendation style article title card with pill metadata and soft-blue excerpt block.
modules.article.prose_shell: Readable white-card article body styling for rendered markdown HTML, images, tables, lists, and blockquotes.
modules.article.related_articles: Rounded related-content cards using the same numbered badge language as homepage latest articles.
modules.article.sticky_ad: Converted from floating sticky ad to a soft-blue inline optional ad slot.
modules.archive.overview_row: API recommendation style archive month cards for the homepage More destination.
modules.archive.article_card: Archive month article list reuses the same rounded latest-article cards as category pages.
